title: Remote Control Excavator Toys for Boys, RC Excavator Toy for Boys 6 7 8 9+Year Old Kids Christmas Birthday Gift，RC Digger Truck Construction Vehicles with Metal Shovel & Light
features: Long-Lasting Play & Sturdy And Realistic Design – 2×1200mAh battery ensures hours of uninterrupted fun, without the need for constant battery replacements. Made with a durable alloy bucket and featuring realistic flashing lights and engine sounds, our toy excavator provides a truly immersive play experience(Pro tip: manually turn the track before installing the battery.)

Detailed And Realistic - This 1/24 scale model of a excavator is designed with attention to detail, making it a realistic and visually appealing toy, Equipped with robust rubber tracks, this toy can freely travel on various terrains, replicating the mobility of a real construction vehicle.

Featured Multi-Channel Manipulation - The toy excavator can be manipulated flexibly for digging, handling, lifting, etc. Each channel of the excavator can be operated individually or together, giving children a truly immersive experience. With its mechanical sound effects and a flexible robotic arm, this toy brings realism to playtime.

Multi-functional remote control excavator - Features a unique and realistic cab that can be rotated a full 680 degrees. With its high-quality construction, this excavator toy is built to withstand rough play and last for years. The 2. 4Ghz Multi-channel controller allows for easy and precise movement, while the playful light and sound effects add to the excitement. Get ready for some rugged adventures with this incredible remote control excavator toy.

Outdoor Sand Toys for Toddles - The Little Engineers can spend hours playing with their excavator toy, driving it on the beach or in the yard, and enjoying the ability to scoop, transfer, and dump sand on their very own construction sites.

Best Gifts Ideas for Kids - The great holiday surprise gift for your little ones. This fun construction toy will truly amaze your kids and keep them entertained for hours on end. Great for parent-children activity. Also funning toy playing with friends to increase kid’s cooperation ability.
description: From the brand JIAKORA High quality products, specialized in producing RC cars and powerful structural series, designed for excitement and imagination. Previous page RC Engineering Series children's toys Next page
